_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-audio. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

op.description: tts = text-to-speech; music = music/ambience; sfx = sound effect.

text.description: Speech text for tts, or the prompt for music/sfx.

voice.description: tts only: MiniMax system voice id (default Wise_Woman).

model.description: Optional Replicate model slug override for the op.

function.name: mythosforge_audio
function.description: Generate audio via Replicate — tts (minimax/speech-02-turbo), music (meta/musicgen), or sfx (stackadoc/stable-audio-open). Writes the audio file to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

text.description: Speech text for tts, or the prompt for music/sfx.

voice.description: tts only: MiniMax system voice id.

format.description: Audio format where the op supports one.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_audio
anthropic.description: Generate audio via Replicate — tts (minimax/speech-02-turbo), music (meta/musicgen), or sfx (stackadoc/stable-audio-open). Writes the audio file to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

text.description: Speech text for tts, or the prompt for music/sfx.

voice.description: tts only: MiniMax system voice id.

format.description: Audio format where the op supports one.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, op, text, path, bytes }. Feed `path` back to the model as the tool result.
